title: SimpleAutoSprint
description: Forces sprint no matter what. Disables your ability to stop sprinting
body:
### Forces you to sprint whenever you're walking no matter what!

Completely disables the ability to stop sprinting (while mod is enabled)

Sprint keybinds/settings no longer function (while mod is enabled)

**usage: /sprint to toggle whether the mod is enabled or not.**
![usage: **/sprint** to toggle whether the mod is enabled or not.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42186bb7db93cf0226f5037f8548deb54e148a26.png)

Requires fabric loader 0.18.3 or higher
